name: Reka Edge (7B)
archDisplay: Dense 7B transformer decoder + vision encoder (SwiGLU, Grouped Query Attention, RoPE, RMSNorm)
note: Compact 7B multimodal model for on-device/local use, announced alongside Reka Flash on Feb 12, 2024 (documented together with Flash/Core in Reka's April 2024 technical report); beat Gemma 7B and Mistral 7B on Reka's reported benchmarks.
